arts.ttl: Young Ajax winger becomes Burnley's second capture of transfer deadline day
arts.sum: Burnley have made Ajax wide man Jaydon Banel their second signing of transfer deadline day.

arts.ttl: Kyle Edwards joins League One side after expiration of U’s deal
arts.sum: KYLE Edwards has joined Sky Bet League One side Stevenage.

arts.ttl: Owen Dale seals deadline day move to League One side on loan
arts.sum: OWEN Dale has joined Wigan Athletic on loan from Oxford United in a deadline day deal until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Burnley agree deal to buy Ajax player – Deadline move for low transfer fee
arts.sum: Dutch newspaper De Telegraaf has some news for Burnley on Monday evening, just a few hours before the transfer window closes for the Championship club. De Telegraaf report that Ajax are in the processing of finalising the transfer of Jaydon Banel to the Clarets, in what sounds like a permanent transfer. arts.ttl: Burnley man pens new contract before joining League One outfit on loan
arts.sum: Dara Costelloe has put pen to paper on a new contract for Burnley – before sealing a loan move to League One side Northampton Town.

arts.ttl: Burnley's Maxime Esteve stance clarified after talk of late deadline day bid from Tottenham
arts.sum: Reports suggesting Tottenham Hotpsur have launched a late deadline day bid for Burnley’s Maxime Esteve are wide of the mark, the Burnley Express understands.

arts.ttl: Tottenham Hotspur make 11th hour £20m bid for Burnley star
arts.sum: Burnley have demanded £30m for Maxime Esteve amid a last-gasp bid of £20m from Tottenham Hotspur, according to… The post Tottenham Hotspur make 11th hour £20m bid for Burnley star appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Tottenham offer £20m to Burnley for Maxime Estève – Clarets want 50% more
arts.sum: French newspaper L’Equipe have a scoop on a late Tottenham Hotspur attempt to sign Maxime Estève from Burnley. According to the French newspaper, Spurs have presented a deadline day offer worth £20m to the Championship club in an attempt to take the player immediately. arts.ttl: Tottenham offer €24 million to Burnley for Maxime Estève
arts.sum: According to a report from L’Équipe journalist Loïc Tanzi, Tottenham have sent a €26 million offer to Burnley FC for Maxime Estève (22). However, the Championship side are holding out…

arts.ttl: John Egan explains Hull City move after Burnley deadline day departure is confirmed
arts.sum: John Egan’s deadline day move to Burnley’s fellow Championship side Hull City has now been confirmed
